caption: Explain this print.
code_path: bot._try_print_translator_reply (real handler, spied engine, no Telegram)

vision.vision_result: The image shows a page from a technical manual, specifically section 6.3 "System configuration rules" with the subheading "Configuration notes for using device connectors". The content is text-based and appears to be an electrical drawing or schematic, likely a wiring or configuration diagram.

messages_sent_to_router.user_text:
Drawing type: wiring diagram

No OCR labels were extracted; rely on the image.

translator_reply:
## 1. What this appears to be
This appears to be a configuration note for using device connectors, specifically for 3ZY12 device connectors with Advanced device series.

## 2. Main visible components
The main visible components are:
* Text-based configuration notes and warnings.

## 3. Plain-English theory of operation
The configuration notes indicate that:
* 3ZY12 device connectors can only be used with devices of the Advanced device series.
* Only one 3SK1 Advanced basic unit is permitted in each system; the safety function is not guaranteed when more than one basic unit is used.
* The supply voltage of 24 V DC must only be fed in on the basic unit; otherwise, the safety function is bypassed.

## 4. What must be true for it to work
According to the configuration notes:
* Only one 3SK1 Advanced basic unit is permitted in each system.
* The supply voltage must only be fed in on the basic unit.

## 5. What would stop it from working
The configuration notes indicate that:
* Using more than one 3SK1 Advanced basic unit in each system would stop it from working.
* Feeding the supply voltage into any component other than the basic unit would stop it from working.

## 6. Unclear or unreadable items
Nothing major appears to be unreadable.
